user_query: Add a zucchini noodle pesto bowl dinner option for mother on day 4

fields.name: Zucchini Noodle Pesto Bowl
fields.short_description: Light and vibrant zucchini noodles tossed with a basil-pine nut pesto, cherry tomatoes, and toasted chickpeas for added texture — a low-carb, nutrient-dense dinner option.
fields.meal_suggestion: Use a spiralizer or peeler to make zucchini noodles (zoodles). Gently sauté zoodles in a skillet with a drizzle of olive oil for 1–2 minutes until just tender. Toss with homemade basil pesto (fresh basil, pine nuts, garlic, parmesan, olive oil) and halved cherry tomatoes. Top with crispy toasted chickpeas (roast canned chickpeas with a pinch of salt and smoked paprika at 400°F/200°C for 20–30 minutes) and a sprinkle of grated parmesan. Serve immediately with lemon wedges.
fields.nutrition_note: Low in refined carbs and high in vegetables — zucchini provides fiber and hydration, basil and olive oil deliver antioxidants and healthy fats, and chickpeas add plant-based protein and extra fiber for satiety. A lighter dinner that supports balanced macronutrients and micronutrient intake.

result.reasoning: Mother's Day 4 dinner had no listed options in the retrieved context; position -1 appends this complementary light, low-carb dinner option to the dinner choices for Day 4.
